name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new tool, config knob, or behavior
labels: enhancement

## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that the MCP doesn't support today? Concrete example beats abstract description. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- New tool? Extra arg on an existing tool? Env var? Explorer UI tweak? New frontmatter field? Sketch the shape, not necessarily the implementation. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Workarounds you've tried, or "I could do X manually but it's painful because Y." -->

## Notes

<!-- Anything else — links to similar features in other tools, related issues/PRs, etc. -->
